result.text:
Things you can do only on TON Blockchain:

- Own Telegram username: you can own your own Telegram username as an NFT on TON, and no one can take it away from you. You could sell/buy username if you wish, or simply mint yours on-chain.

- Own Telegram Anonymous number: they are also NFTs on TON which you can own, buy, sell or transfer. The use case is literally a number, like a phone number :)

- Own your own DNS domain: similar to ENS on Ethereum, there’s DNS on TON, that you can tight to your wallet address & have something like Jeribond.ton instead. So anytime someone wants to send you something, they could do it through your DNS domain, rather than a long string of numbers (wallet address).

What you can do with your DNS on TON is different from ENS, because you also could use it to host a Decentralised Website in Telegram Browser.

I know it sounds wild, check it out :)

- Send USDt through Telegram username to your friends/family members within seconds by the username. Quite literally!

As easy as sending a text message.

- Own Telegram NFT Gifts: recently Pavel Durov has released a few collections of Telegram Gifts, that now are NFTs on TON.

You can upgrade them to be a collectible & sell on GetGems for example (NFT Marketplace on TON).

You can also display them on your Telegram Profile, which is THE BEST utility that I have ever seen for an NFT.

Personally on my TG I am rocking Durov’s Cap Telegram NFT Gift, while Zenith wear Plush Pepe.

- Play games on Telegram & receive Airdrop: there are many Airdrops that happened in TON Ecosystem, with the biggest ones being Catizen, Notcoin, Dogs & Hamster Kombat.

- Order a taxi through Telegram & pay in TON or USDt: application such as TADA has achieved big success with their MiniApp.

- Build a MiniApp that can easily reach tens of millions of users, due to the Telegram’s 950M+ MAU.

—-//—-

Mass Adoption is happening on TON.
And this is just a tip of the iceberg 💎
